- The red bar is now vertical at (24,18)-(29,21)

- Current red: hash=0a715cb0dcd69831 (vertical 6x4 at cols 18-21)

- Blue shape (47 px): looks like a T shape

- Blue block (16 px) + checkerboard (8 px) = 24 px total blue, but target is 47 px

- Blue target: 47 px (blue) + 40 px (white outline) = 87 px total
